sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91812" key="puroforiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῠρο-φορικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n91812.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πυροφόροι </foreign>( <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πυρφόροι</ref> </xr>)<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, δεῖπνα</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5(2).269.25</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Mantinea</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
